row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: Forward motion along a curved road path.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: Red trajectory lines indicate ego vehicle following the lane curvature; blue line suggests lateral offset or boundary tracking.

semantic.scene_summary: Nighttime urban street scene with dim lighting. Road curves gently to the right. Buildings and fences line both sides. Streetlights provide sparse illumination.
semantic.visibility_notes: Low visibility due to darkness; some objects are blurred or partially obscured by shadows.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Smooth forward progression consistent with driving on a curved road. No abrupt jumps or discontinuities in object positions.
logical.object_continuity: Distant vehicle remains visible throughout frames without sudden disappearance or duplication.
logical.structure_continuity: Road geometry and roadside structures maintain consistent spatial relationships across frames.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward steadily along the curve.
decision.risk_context: Reduced visibility may require cautious navigation, but no immediate hazard is visually apparent.

semantic.scene_summary: Similar nighttime urban street scene as Row 1, but with noticeable artifacts and reduced clarity. Road layout and basic elements are preserved but appear distorted or smeared.
semantic.visibility_notes: Significant blur and ghosting reduce object definition; some features appear duplicated or warped.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Forward motion appears generally smooth but exhibits minor flickering and warping effects, especially around moving light sources.
logical.object_continuity: Most objects persist across frames, though their shapes and positions show slight instability or drifting.
logical.structure_continuity: Road structure remains recognizable but suffers from localized distortions and edge smearing.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward, maintaining course despite visual degradation.
decision.risk_context: Visual artifacts may impair perception of fine details, potentially affecting downstream decision-making under low-light conditions.
